overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a near-future London street during an overcast autumn dusk. The character passes modern architecture, autumn foliage, a street memorial, and approaches a secure Albion private security facility with distinctive purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban pedestrian street with modern office towers

events.description: character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement, passing autumn trees and modern buildings

trees with orange and red autumn foliage lining the sidewalk
low-rise building with red brick facade and greenery on top
wooden park bench on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city street during an overcast autumn dusk. Modern glass towers rise in the background while autumn trees line the path. The character passes a pedestrian in an orange jacket and continues along the reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with construction barriers and roadside memorial

events.description: passing a makeshift memorial site with flowers and candles on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past construction barriers and a memorial site

entered.detail: black construction barriers with yellow caution tape blocking off an area
informal memorial with flowers, candles, and photos placed against the barrier
large multi-story residential building with distinctive external balconies and greenery

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a construction zone marked by black barriers and yellow tape, where a makeshift memorial with flowers has been placed. The large Albion apartment building with external balconies becomes visible ahead, dominating the street view as the glass office tower recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure facility entrance with neon lighting

events.description: approaching the Albion private security facility entrance with illuminated signage
character stops walking and turns around to face the facility building

agents.ego_description: walking past the security facility then turning to observe the building architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking past the security gate

entered.detail: tall security gate with metal fencing and concrete pillars marking the facility entrance
large circular sign with Albion Private Security emblem mounted on the fence
building facade illuminated with vibrant purple neon lights and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the secure Albion facility entrance, passing the corporate logo sign and security gate. Purple neon lights illuminate the building facade on the left. After passing the entrance, the character turns to face the building, revealing the full scale of the modern apartment complex with its distinctive external balconies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet city street that transitions from a general urban autumn landscape into the imposing presence of a secure corporate facility. It begins with the character walking past modern glass towers and autumn trees under an overcast dusk sky, moving along reflective pavement past a pedestrian in an orange jacket. As the camera progresses, the view shifts past a construction zone marked by yellow tape and a makeshift floral memorial, while a massive Albion apartment building begins to dominate the horizon as the office towers recede. The scene then opens up to the secure facility entrance, passing a corporate logo and security gate illuminated by vibrant purple neon lights. Finally, the camera turns toward the building to reveal the full scale of the modern complex and its distinctive external balconies.
